roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEF ATTNY MOT TO RECALL BW FILED TODAY

/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/REIN ORIG TC/PROB EXP: 07-12-18/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION TO MISSION BAY PARKS IN THE AMOUNT OF $11,755 PLUS INTEREST & ADMINISTRATIVE FEE/X:CR-110 ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION & CR-111 ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED,/X:CR-115 DEFENDANT'S STATEMENT OF ASSETSFILED,/

/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/X:DEPARTMENT 30 DOESN'T HEAR FELONY RESTITUTION MATTERS/X:SILAS GENESON HAS AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT RESTITUTION & CR-110/X:VICTIM MISSION BAY PARKS CLAIMS $11,755,00/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:APD MOTION TO MODIFY RESTITUTION/CON:SILAS GENESON/PROB ADM REV/CTORD:PROBATION ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED ONLY FOR THE PURPOSES OF RETAINING JURISDICTION FOR RESTITUTION/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING (BEFORE 07-12-18)/DOP/

/CAL: TO SET DA MTR/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA: 07-18-17/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/SA4: MISSION BAY PARK, 451 BERRY STREET, SF/SAORD/CTORD: ANY RESTITUTION OUTSTANDING FROM CASE #17010213 WILL TRANSFER TO THIS CASE VIA HARVEY WAIVER/PROB EXT: 07-12-18 /4019HALF/

/CAL:DA MTR FILING/X:DA MTR FILED/PD/CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S12 /TBH:17010213/PROB ADM REV/OR/X:OR MINIMUM SUPERVISION, EFENDANT TO CHECK IN 2 TIMESPER WEEK IN PERSON/CONTD:TO SET DA MTR TRAILING #17010213/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/AMEND:4/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:4/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:07-13-15/REMA/ARBUCKLE/DOP/SA2:74 TURK ST,, SF/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN - FTA APD MTR FILING/CON:GREG GOLDMAN/BWDNC/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ: 4 DAYS/ADDL CTS: 4/PROB EXP: 07-12-18/4019HALF/
/CAL:DEFT MOTION RECALL BW/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:BENCH WARRANT REMAINS OUTSTANDING (DO NOT ADD)/
